title: DRY RUN: Inspect loosefruit list page structure (frmPrTrxLooseFruitList.aspx)
description: Inspect the loosefruit list page at http://plantwarep3:8001/en/PR/trx/frmPrTrxLooseFruitList.aspx. Identify: URL path constant, column structure (DocID, LocCode, Status, etc.), how to search by DocID pattern (LIKE '%[_]%'), how to select rows, how to trigger delete action, delete confirmation mechanism. Mirror page-actions.ts and duplicate-docids.ts pattern.

criteria: Page URL constant added to plantware/urls.ts or page-actions.ts

Page actions file created: loosefruit-page-actions.ts with: gotoLoosefruitListPage, searchLoosefruitByDocId, getLoosefruitRowCount, selectLoosefruitRows, deleteSelectedLoosefruit, confirmDelete (or equivalent)
Page structure documented (columns, search inputs, action buttons)
